compiled_state.title: [RED] Write failing test for scale-inference shared prompt and brainstorm Phase 1 integration
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Build
Create `tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh` — a bash test that fails (exits 1) against the current codebase because `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md` does not yet exist.

Follow the pattern in `tests/skills/test-value-effort-scorer-integration.sh`: section headers with `=== test_name ===`, pass/fail counters, python3 section extractor for structural checks.

## Test Sections and Assertions

### Section: test_scale_inference_file_exists
- Given brainstorm SKILL.md exists and scale-inference.md does NOT yet exist / When test runs / Then fails because scale-inference.md is absent
- Assertion: `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md` exists and is non-empty

### Section: test_scale_inference_required_sections
- File contains a "Scale Signal Sources" section
- File contains an "Inference Protocol" section with 3-step protocol
- File contains a "Default Assumption" statement (small scale unless evidence found)
- File contains prohibition language against upward interpolation

### Section: test_brainstorm_phase1_references_scale_inference
- Given brainstorm SKILL.md exists / When test checks for reference / Then fails because Phase 1 does not yet reference scale-inference.md
- Assertion: `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains `shared/prompts/scale-inference.md` as a reference

## .test-index Update (required before committing this task)
Add RED markers:
```
[test_scale_inference_file_exists] plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh
[test_brainstorm_phase1_references_scale_inference] plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh
```
Verify: `grep '\[test_scale_inference_file_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh` exists and is executable (chmod +x applied immediately after creation)
  Verify: `test -x tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh`
- [ ] Running the test against the current codebase exits 1 (RED — fails because scale-inference.md does not exist)
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]`
- [ ] .test-index contains RED marker [test_scale_inference_file_exists] for scale-inference.md
  Verify: `grep '\[test_scale_inference_file_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`
- [ ] .test-index contains RED marker [test_brainstorm_phase1_references_scale_inference] for brainstorm/SKILL.md
  Verify: `grep '\[test_brainstorm_phase1_references_scale_inference\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes
  Verify: `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci`

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): The .test-index RED marker entry should map to scale-inference.md (the file being tested), NOT to brainstorm/SKILL.md. Correct format: [test_scale_inference_prompt_exists] plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh — This ensures the test gate fires when scale-inference.md is modified, not on every brainstorm/SKILL.md touch. Update AC to verify the marker maps to scale-inference.md.
comments.author: Test
